sense.definition: a piece of equipment in a radio or television that picks up broadcast signals and alters them into sounds and pictures
a device used to convert digital cable television signals into a format that can be displayed on analog TVs, enabling them to receive and display digital cable channels

examples.x: I had to buy a cable converter box to get all the channels on my old TV.
Without the cable converter box, my TV wouldn’t pick up the cable signal properly.
The cable converter box came with instructions to help set up the channels easily.
After hooking up the cable converter box, the picture on the TV was crystal clear.
The technician gave us a new cable converter box to replace the broken one.

sense.definition: the technology that delivers cable television signals without the need for physical cables, using wireless communication methods instead

examples.x: I switched to wireless cable so I no longer have to deal with tangled wires behind the TV.
She loves using wireless cable because it allows her to stream content on multiple devices at once.
He installed wireless cable in the living room, so we can watch TV without worrying about running cables everywhere.
The new wireless cable service offers better picture quality and more channels than the old setup.

sense.definition: a device used to alter the frequency of a radio signal
the difference in dark and light colors on a television screen

examples.x: Adjusting the contrast on the TV improved the picture quality.
The high contrast made the colors on the screen more vibrant.
The contrast setting was too low, making the image appear washed out.
The new TV model offers better contrast for a clearer picture.

sense.definition: a small device that lets you control electrical or electronic devices like TVs from a distance

examples.x: He pressed the button on the remote control to pause the movie.
My dad loves using the remote control to switch between different sports channels.
She bought a new remote control for her smart TV to access all its features.
The remote control for the garage door opener allows easy access to the house.
The remote control makes it convenient to operate electronic devices from a distance.

sense.definition: the flat panel on a television, computer, etc. on which images and information are displayed

examples.x: During the presentation, the speaker shared his screen with the audience.
I adjusted the brightness of the screen to reduce eye strain.
She cleaned the screen of her laptop to remove smudges.
The screen of my phone is cracked, so I need to get it fixed.

sense.definition: an electronic part of a radio or television that allows one to watch or listen to a particular station
the amount of loudness produced by a TV, radio, etc.

examples.x: She increased the volume on the TV so she could hear the dialogue more clearly.
The radio’s volume was too low, so he turned it up to enjoy the music better.
They adjusted the volume of the speakers to ensure everyone at the party could hear the music.
He lowered the volume on his headphones to avoid disturbing others in the library.
He asked them to turn down the volume of the TV because it was too distracting while he worked.

sense.definition: a television system or display format that provides a lower resolution and less detailed image compared to standard-definition (SD) or high-definition (HD) formats

examples.x: My grandparents are used to their old LDTV, so they don’t see the need for an upgrade just yet.
I watched a movie on an LDTV yesterday, and it felt grainy compared to my HD TV.
He decided to upgrade from an LDTV to a 4K television for better picture quality.
They still have an LDTV in the guest room, so the kids use it mostly for playing video games.

sense.definition: a television system or display format that provides a moderate resolution and quality of video and audio compared to lower-quality formats like LDTV or higher-quality formats like HDTV

examples.x: Most channels used to broadcast in SDTV before HD became the standard.
SDTV works fine for basic cable, but if you want crisp images, you'll need to upgrade to an HD TV.
The signal from the antenna is in SDTV, so the picture looks fuzzy compared to streaming in HD.
The old TV in the living room only supports SDTV, so the picture quality isn't as clear as the newer HD models.

sense.definition: a television system that generates extremely clear images on a screen that is wider than a standard television

examples.x: The new HDTV I bought has such a clear picture; it makes watching movies so much more enjoyable.
Most sports events are now broadcast in HDTV, so you can see every detail of the game.
The HDTV in the living room is perfect for movie nights with friends.
When we were watching the concert on an HDTV, the colors of the lights looked vibrant and sharp.

sense.definition: an advanced television system or display format that offers an even higher resolution and improved visual quality compared to HDTV

examples.x: The new UHDTV I bought has such a clear picture, I can see every detail.
When watching movies in 4K on my UHDTV, the colors look so vibrant.
I can't believe how sharp the sports game looks on this UHDTV.
We upgraded to a UHDTV

sense.definition: a tube-shaped part in which electrons create bright images, and is used in old television or computer screens

examples.x: The old television in the attic still uses a cathode-ray tube, so it's bulky and heavy.
The monitor at the computer lab was a cathode-ray tube, making it much thicker than today's models.
The cathode-ray tube technology in older televisions doesn't compare to the sharpness of modern LCD screens.
The cathode-ray tube in the old computer screen took up so much desk space that we had to clear everything off to make room.

sense.definition: a type of television where the image is projected onto the back of the screen using a combination of light sources, mirrors, and lenses, allowing for larger screen sizes but with deeper TV cabinets compared to flat-panel TVs

examples.x: We had to adjust the viewing angle on the rear-projection television to get the best picture quality.
The living room feels more spacious now that the old rear-projection television is replaced with a flat-screen model.

sense.definition: a television set that has a screen made of plasma
an entertainment system with television and sound equipment designed to create an experience which is similar to being in a movie theater
a device that is used to send and receive signals

examples.x: The satellite dish functions as an antenna to receive signals from space.
The car's antenna helps improve radio reception while driving in remote areas.
The scientist adjusted the antenna to optimize the reception of data from the distant probe.
The cellphone tower has multiple antennas to transmit and receive signals from mobile devices.

sense.definition: equipment that transforms electrical signals into sound, loud enough for public announcements, playing music, etc.

examples.x: He connected his phone to the Bluetooth speaker and played his favorite playlist.
She adjusted the volume on the stereo speakers to fill the room with music.
The DJ tested the bass response of the speakers before the party started.
High-quality speakers can enhance the listening experience, revealing details in music that cheaper models might miss.

sense.definition: a thin and sleek television with a flat panel display, offering a space-saving design compared to older CRT TVs
an old-fashioned, big TV with a large tube to show pictures on the screen
a system of delivering television programming to subscribers, using wires under the ground

examples.x: Cable television offers subscribers access to hundreds of channels, including premium and specialty networks.
Many households rely on cable television for news, entertainment, and sports programming.
The cable television industry has evolved with the introduction of digital and high-definition channels.
Subscribers can choose from various cable television packages that cater to different viewing preferences.
Cable television providers offer on-demand services and DVR options for recording and watching programs at a convenient time.

sense.definition: a type of television broadcast that employs satellites to send out programs that are received by a dish antenna in a specific region

examples.x: Many rural areas rely on satellite television to access a variety of channels.
Satellite television offers hundreds of international channels that cable cannot provide.
Switching from cable to satellite television gave them better reception and more options.
With satellite television, we can access niche programs from around the world.
The storm disrupted the satellite television signal for a few hours.

sense.definition: a digital interface that enables the transmission of high-quality audio and video signals between devices, simplifying the connection of various entertainment and multimedia devices

examples.x: I used an HDMI cable to connect my laptop to the TV for a clearer presentation.
The gaming console comes with an HDMI port for high-definition graphics.
Make sure the HDMI cable is plugged in properly to get the best picture quality.
The Blu-ray player delivers better visuals when using an HDMI cable instead of the old ones.

sense.definition: a special type of wire that carries signals, like TV or Internet, using a central wire surrounded by a layer called insulation along with a metal covering to protect the signals from interference

examples.x: The technician replaced the old coaxial cable to improve the signal strength for the television.
I need a longer coaxial cable to connect the antenna to the TV in the living room.
The internet connection was slow, so the technician checked the coaxial cable for any damage.
You can find a variety of coaxial cables at the electronics store for different devices.
The TV reception improved after we switched to a higher quality coaxial cable.

sense.definition: a type of cable used to transmit video signals in high-quality analog format, typically consisting of three separate cables or connectors for the red, green, and blue video channels

examples.x: I had to buy a component video cable because my TV did not support HDMI connections.
The projector still uses a component video cable for input, even though it is an older model.
The red, blue, and green plugs on the component video cable confused me at first, but I got them in the right slots.
The gaming console works fine with a component video cable, but HDMI gives even sharper visuals.

sense.definition: a single cable used to transmit combined analog video signals, including both brightness and color information, typically used to connect older video devices to compatible displays or TVs

examples.x: I had to dig out an old composite video cable to connect the DVD player to the TV.
The composite video cable is easy to set up, but the image quality is not as good as with newer cables.
You will need a composite video cable to watch movies on this older TV.
The composite video cable works fine, but I’m thinking of upgrading to HDMI for better resolution.

sense.definition: a video cable that splits the video signal into separate brightness and color components, resulting in better picture quality when connecting devices that support it

examples.x: I used an S-Video cable to connect my old DVD player to the TV for a clearer picture.
If you want better video quality than what you get with composite cables, try using an S-Video cable.
I found an S-Video cable in my drawer, so I connected it to the projector for movie night.
I had to order a special S-Video cable online because my TV only supports that type of connection.

sense.definition: a type of cable used to connect a computer or laptop to a monitor or display
a digital video cable used to connect devices such as computers to monitors or displays, transmitting high-quality video signals in a digital format
a digital video and audio interface standard used to transmit high-quality video and audio signals between devices such as computers, monitors, and televisions

examples.x: The office upgraded all the monitors to ones that support DisplayPort, so the image is much sharper.
The computer only has one DisplayPort, so I need an adapter to connect my old monitor.
If you want to play games in 4K, it's better to use a DisplayPort instead of HDMI.
My desktop has both HDMI and DisplayPort options, but I prefer using DisplayPort for gaming.

sense.definition: a type of cable used to transmit analog or digital audio signals between audio devices, such as speakers, amplifiers, headphones, or audio interfaces, allowing for the playback or recording of audio content

examples.x: I need a new audio cable to connect my speakers to the TV.
He bought a longer audio cable to use with his home theater system.
I have an audio cable that connects my computer to the speakers for better sound quality.
Make sure the audio cable is securely connected before playing the music.
